text: WIN THE OPENAI HACKATHON with Aimparency, GPT-5.6, and Codex
description: **BOLD IDEA: WIN THE OPENAI HACKATHON.** Build the strongest Developer Tools entry by using GPT-5.6 through Codex to meaningfully extend Aimparency during the eligible July 13-21 window. Position Aimparency as the Git-native intent and dependency layer for open-source development: code history says what changed; Aimparency records why, what it depends on, and whether implementation fulfilled the intent. The central proof should be a coherent, working intent-to-code provenance experience showing aims, dependencies, linked repositories, and realizing commits. The submission story is intentionally recursive and demonstrable: we used GPT-5.6 and Codex inside Aimparency, guided by the Aimparency graph, to build the extension intended to win the OpenAI Build Week hackathon. Developer Tools track. Deadline: 21 July 2026, 17:00 PDT (22 July 02:00 CEST).

status.comment: Go decision made 2026-07-18. Active objective: build, document, demo, and submit a winning Developer Tools entry.
